case_title: ** TRANSFERRED TO SAN MATEO SUPERIOR COURT ** ENERBANK USA VS. AMY TRAN ET AL

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Action To San Mateo County Superior Court
Off Calendar Sep-25-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT AMY TRAN's Motion To Transfer Action To San Mateo County Superior Court.

Grant. No opposition filed.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
